name: Molstar Viewer
description: Simulate energy minimization between a protein and ligand or protein only in aqueous solution. Run molecular simulation with GROMACS forcefield and conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and PCA.
capabilities: Simulate energy minimization between a protein and ligand or protein only in aqueous solution
Run molecular simulation with GROMACS forcefield and conduct trajectory analysis including RMSD, RMSF, Rg, and PCA

pdb_file.description: Protein structure in PDB format for molecular dynamics simulation

ligand_file.description: Ligand structure in SDF format for protein-ligand simulation

forcefield.description: GROMACS force field for the simulation
